raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-commitment declaration of ongoing metacognitive practice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a meaningful distinction exists between occurring thoughts and endorsed thoughts",
    "the speaker can reliably identify and act on this distinction",
    "deliberate practice will improve this skill",
    "such practice aligns with the speaker's values or goals"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a process-oriented intention; presupposes but does not contradict the distinction it names",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker possesses basic metacognitive capacity, tracks actual behavior against the stated intention over time, and receives feedback confirming the distinction improves decision-making or reduces unwanted identification with transient thoughts",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "statement functions as self-image management without corresponding behavioral change, or the distinction is applied rigidly to suppress valid spontaneous cognition rather than to enable selective endorsement"
}
